name: vault-curate
desc: Hybrid semantic search and AI curation for your vault. Combines BM25 keyword, on-device WebGPU embeddings, and fuzzy title matching. Multilingual, with particu…
descFull: Hybrid semantic search and AI curation for your vault. Combines BM25 keyword, on-device WebGPU embeddings, and fuzzy title matching. Multilingual, with particularly strong Chinese/CJK support. Opt-in AI features auto-generate note descriptions and topic-grouped Maps of Content. Local-first, no API keys.
